_comment: SYNCED SNAPSHOT — do not hand-edit. Regenerate with: node scripts/sync-workflow-catalog.mjs (pulls api.esy.com GET /v1/catalog/workflows). Mirrors the platform's published, versioned workflow templates.

items.name: Edit Image (Instruction)
items.description: Edit a platform-stored image with a natural-language instruction (OpenAI images/edits), with optional background re-removal for transparent assets.
items.shortDescription: Instruction-based image edit (img2img).

stages.name: Edit
stages.description: Apply the instruction to the source image.

stages.name: Post-process
stages.description: Re-remove the background when transparency is requested.

fields.name: sourceUrl
fields.description: Platform artifact URL of the image to edit

items.name: Finalize Clip Art Asset
items.description: Produce the distribution-ready export of an ACCEPTED clip-art artifact: ESRGAN upscale to the ~3000px master, then local export normalization (alpha-trimmed bounding box + margin, stray-speck floor, sRGB by convention, 300-DPI transparent PNG). Quality is added HERE, on the image a human approved — never by re-rendering, which would be a new sample rather than a sharper version of the accepted one. This is the storefront's credit-gated draft->finalize step and the source of the export URLs the pack ingest ships verbatim.
items.shortDescription: Distribution-ready 300-DPI PNG export of an accepted asset.

stages.name: Upscale
stages.description: ESRGAN 3x to the ~3000px export master.

stages.name: Export
stages.description: Trim, margin, sRGB, 300-DPI PNG.

whatYouGet: Export-grade transparent PNG (~3000px, 300 DPI) in ESY R2

fields.name: asset
fields.description: The accepted clip-art artifact to finalize.

items.name: Generate Analytical Essay
items.description: Deconstruct a text, event, or concept through a critical lens: perform close reading, identify patterns and themes, then produce a structured analytical essay grounded in specific evidence from the source.
items.shortDescription: Analyze a text or concept through a critical lens.

stages.name: Analyze
stages.description: Close-read the source and surface patterns.

stages.name: Outline
stages.description: Frame the interpretation under a thesis.

stages.name: Draft
stages.description: Compose the analysis with textual evidence.

fields.name: subject
fields.description: The text, work, event, or concept to analyze

fields.name: lens
fields.description: Analytical lens or framework (e.g. historical, feminist, formal)

fields.name: citationStyle
fields.description: Citation style for any cited sources

items.name: Generate Argumentative Essay
items.description: Build a thesis-driven argumentative essay: develop supporting evidence and the strongest counterarguments, organize them under a clear thesis, then draft a fully structured essay with a counterargument section and conclusion.
items.shortDescription: Draft a thesis-driven argumentative essay with rebuttals.

stages.name: Develop
stages.description: Develop evidence and map counterarguments.

stages.name: Outline
stages.description: Organize evidence under a clear thesis.

stages.name: Draft
stages.description: Compose the argument with a rebuttal.

fields.name: stance
fields.description: The position the essay should defend

fields.name: citationStyle
fields.description: Citation style for any cited sources

items.name: Generate Character Reference Set
items.description: Render the practitioner-standard labeled character reference sheet (front view, full-body, three-quarter view, expression grid — name written on the sheet, plain neutral background) from a character bible. The sheet is the visual anchor for reference-consistent generation: pass its URL to generate-clip-art-asset-ref and generate-pack-cover. Product-agnostic — storyboard/scene pipelines can consume the same character-set artifact.
items.shortDescription: Labeled character reference model sheet.

stages.name: Render
stages.description: Render the labeled model sheet.

stages.name: Classify
stages.description: Title the sheet for the library.

whatYouGet: Reference sheet in ESY R2 (the reference URL for asset/cover runs)

fields.name: characterSpec
fields.description: The character bible (compactBible or full spec text)

fields.name: packTitle
fields.description: Pack context for the sheet label

items.name: Generate Clip Art (reference-consistent)
items.description: Sibling of generate-clip-art-asset-v2 for CHARACTER PACKS: renders each asset AGAINST a character reference sheet (openai/image-edit) so the same character holds across a whole pack. The prompt must be fully compiled (compactBible + subject + styleFragment — plan-clipart-pack does this); the reference sheet URL is shared across an order's children via intake_base. Then background removal and catalog classification, exactly like v2.
items.shortDescription: Reference-consistent clip-art asset (character packs).

stages.name: Render
stages.description: Render the asset against the reference sheet.

stages.name: Post-process
stages.description: Remove the background when transparency is requested.

stages.name: Classify
stages.description: Produce catalog metadata.

whatYouGet: Final + raw images in ESY R2
qaChecks: Character fidelity to the reference sheet

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: FULLY compiled prompt (character bible + subject + style fragment)

fields.name: referenceUrl
fields.description: Character-set sheet URL (platform storage or trusted origin)

fields.name: elementType
fields.description: Pack element type; 'pattern' ships full-bleed and skips background removal

fields.name: categories
fields.description: Comma-separated category slugs the classifier may choose from

fields.name: textPolicy
fields.description: Per-item text contract: none = text forbidden; exact = must match expectedText; freeform = text allowed, judged on legibility/spelling only. Empty derives from textBearing (true=exact, false=none).

fields.name: textBearing
fields.description: True when the asset must carry legible text (the OCR gate then checks it)

fields.name: expectedText
fields.description: The EXACT text the asset must carry; leave empty unless textPolicy is 'exact'

items.name: Generate Clip Art (v2)
items.description: Generate a catalog-ready clip-art asset: styled render, optional background removal (variant selectable via the backgroundRemover role), and classifier-produced catalog metadata — one audited run per asset. Successor to generate-clip-art-asset.
items.shortDescription: Catalog-ready clip-art asset with classification.

stages.name: Render
stages.description: Compose the styled prompt and call the image model.

stages.name: Post-process
stages.description: Remove the background when transparency is requested.

stages.name: Classify
stages.description: Produce catalog metadata (title/slug/description/category/tags).

whatYouGet: Final + raw images in ESY R2

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: Subject prompt for the isolated object or character

fields.name: elementType
fields.description: Pack element type; 'pattern' ships full-bleed and skips background removal

fields.name: categories
fields.description: Comma-separated category slugs the classifier may choose from

fields.name: textPolicy
fields.description: Per-item text contract: none = text forbidden; exact = must match expectedText; freeform = text allowed, judged on legibility/spelling only. Empty derives from textBearing (true=exact, false=none).

fields.name: textBearing
fields.description: True when the asset must carry legible text (the OCR gate then checks it)

fields.name: expectedText
fields.description: The EXACT text the asset must carry; leave empty unless textPolicy is 'exact'

items.name: Generate Clip Art Asset
items.description: Generate an internal ESY visual artifact using the clip.art prompt/style contract, provider runtime policy, ESY R2 storage, and review-ready metadata.
items.shortDescription: Generate a reviewable internal clip-art asset.

stages.name: Generate image
stages.description: Compose the clip-art prompt and call the still-image provider.

stages.name: Remove background
stages.description: Remove background with fal.ai when enabled, then store in ESY R2.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: Subject prompt for the isolated object or character

items.name: Generate College Application Essay
items.description: Draft a personal college application essay: find a distinctive angle from the applicant's background, structure a focused story, then draft a voice-driven essay that answers the prompt within the word limit.
items.shortDescription: Draft a distinctive personal college application essay.

stages.name: Angle
stages.description: Find a distinctive angle from the background.

stages.name: Outline
stages.description: Structure a focused personal story.

stages.name: Draft
stages.description: Compose a voice-driven essay.

fields.name: background
fields.description: Applicant's experiences, values, and details to draw from

items.name: Generate Coloring Page
items.description: Generate a printable coloring page: clean black line art on a white background (no fills, no shading), plus classifier-produced catalog metadata.
items.shortDescription: Printable line-art coloring page with classification.

stages.name: Render
stages.description: Compose the line-art prompt and call the image model.

stages.name: Classify
stages.description: Produce catalog metadata.

whatYouGet: Printable line-art image in ESY R2

fields.name: categories
fields.description: Comma-separated category slugs the classifier may choose from

items.name: Generate Expository Essay
items.description: Explain a topic clearly and objectively: organize the key facts and concepts into a logical structure, then draft a balanced expository essay that informs without arguing a side.
items.shortDescription: Explain a topic clearly in a balanced expository essay.

stages.name: Develop
stages.description: Gather the key facts and concepts.

stages.name: Outline
stages.description: Sequence the explanation logically.

stages.name: Draft
stages.description: Compose a clear, balanced explanation.

fields.name: citationStyle
fields.description: Citation style for any cited sources

items.name: Generate Illustration
items.description: Generate a full-scene illustration (detailed background, environment, lighting) in one of 16 styles, plus classifier-produced catalog metadata.
items.shortDescription: Full-scene styled illustration with classification.

stages.name: Render
stages.description: Compose the styled scene prompt and call the image model.

stages.name: Classify
stages.description: Produce catalog metadata.

fields.name: categories
fields.description: Comma-separated category slugs the classifier may choose from

items.name: Generate Narrative Essay
items.description: Tell a true, reflective story: shape a premise and narrative arc, structure the scenes, then draft a narrative essay with vivid detail and a clear reflective takeaway.
items.shortDescription: Shape a reflective story into a narrative essay.

stages.name: Premise
stages.description: Shape the premise and narrative arc.

stages.name: Outline
stages.description: Sequence the scenes and turning point.

stages.name: Draft
stages.description: Compose the story with reflection.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: Story prompt, experience, or theme to write about

items.name: Generate Pack Cover
items.description: Compose the marketplace hero cover for a theme pack: a single composed scene rendered from the pack plan's cover instruction against MULTIPLE reference images (character sheet + hero assets — gpt-image-2 edits accept several inputs at high fidelity). Portrait 3:4, thumbnail-first composition. Contact-sheet preview grids remain the consumer's deterministic concern.
items.shortDescription: Composed marketplace hero cover from pack references.

stages.name: Compose
stages.description: Render the hero cover from the references.

stages.name: Classify
stages.description: Title the cover for the library.

qaChecks: Overlay text legible at thumbnail size

fields.name: referenceUrls
fields.description: Comma-separated reference image URLs (character sheet + 2-4 hero assets)

fields.name: assetCount
fields.description: Element count for the '50 PNG'-style callout

items.name: Generate Research Infographic
items.description: Produce a vertical infographic that visualizes a research report. Invokes the Generate Research Report workflow as a sub-workflow, then renders its findings as an image with gpt-image-2.
items.shortDescription: Turn a research report into a vertical infographic.

stages.name: Research
stages.description: Run the research report sub-workflow.

stages.name: Compose
stages.description: Compose the infographic image prompt.

stages.name: Render
stages.description: Generate the infographic image.

fields.name: topic
fields.description: Research topic to visualize (used when no source report is supplied)

fields.name: audience
fields.description: Intended audience (passed to the research report)

fields.name: sourceReport
fields.description: An existing research report to visualize (optional — leave empty to generate one)

items.name: Generate Research Paper
items.description: Produce a multi-section academic research paper: synthesize the evidence around a research question, plan the standard sections, then draft a cited paper with an abstract, body sections, and references.
items.shortDescription: Draft a cited, multi-section academic research paper.

stages.name: Synthesize
stages.description: Synthesize evidence around the question.

stages.name: Outline
stages.description: Plan the standard paper sections.

stages.name: Draft
stages.description: Write the cited, multi-section paper.

fields.name: citationStyle
fields.description: Citation style for any cited sources

items.name: Generate Research Report
items.description: Produce a structured, cited research report on a topic using LLM synthesis. Reusable on its own or as a sub-workflow feeding other artifacts.
items.shortDescription: Synthesize a structured, cited research report.

stages.name: Outline
stages.description: Plan the report structure.

stages.name: Synthesize
stages.description: Write the full cited report.

items.name: Generate Worksheet
items.description: Generate a printable children's practice worksheet (grade/subject/topic-driven) with the kid-safety contract baked into the prompt, plus classifier-produced catalog metadata.
items.shortDescription: Printable kid-safe educational worksheet.

stages.name: Render
stages.description: Compose the worksheet prompt (safety preamble included) and call the image model.

stages.name: Classify
stages.description: Produce catalog metadata.

fields.name: categories
fields.description: Comma-separated category slugs the classifier may choose from

items.name: Plan Clip Art Theme Pack
items.description: Plan a complete clip-art THEME PACK the way successful marketplace sellers do: theme/market research, a committed style recipe (with a character bible when the theme sells better around one recurring character), a fully-compiled asset manifest with deliberate element-type variety, and the full listing kit (count-bearing titles, answer-first summary, SEO copy, 13 tags, FAQ, plain-English license, per-asset alt text, cover concept). Emits objective packFacts — the consuming storefront maps facts to tier/price. Items feed a Generation Order over generate-clip-art-asset-ref (character packs) or generate-clip-art-asset-v2.
items.shortDescription: Research + plan a complete clip-art theme pack with listing kit.

stages.name: Research
stages.description: How this theme sells as a bundle; element mix; character decision.

stages.name: Style
stages.description: Committed style recipe + character bible.

stages.name: Manifest
stages.description: Fully-compiled asset prompts with element-type variety.

stages.name: Listing
stages.description: Listing kit + objective packFacts + cover concept.

whatYouGet: A clipart-pack-plan artifact: manifest + listing kit + packFacts + cover concept
Stage artifacts per station (research, style recipe, manifest)

fields.name: audience
fields.description: Who this pack is for (e.g. teachers and classrooms)

fields.name: packGoal
fields.description: What buyers make with it (e.g. classroom decor)

fields.name: styleNotes
fields.description: Freeform style direction layered on the base style

fields.name: recentCatalog
fields.description: JSON snapshot of recent catalog titles (novelty context)

items.name: Remove Image Background
items.description: Remove the background from a platform-stored image. The removal model (BiRefNet variants / BRIA) is selectable per run via the backgroundRemover role.
items.shortDescription: Background removal as a standalone run.

stages.name: Post-process
stages.description: Remove the background and store the transparent image.

fields.name: sourceUrl
fields.description: Platform artifact URL of the image to process

Quality is added HERE, on the image a human approved — never by re-rendering, which would be a new sample rather than a sharper version of the accepted one. This is the storefront's credit-gated draft->finalize step and the source of the export URLs the pack ingest ships verbatim.
items.shortDescription: Distribution-ready 300-DPI PNG export of an accepted asset.

stages.name: Upscale
stages.description: ESRGAN 3x to the ~3000px export master.

stages.name: Export
stages.description: Trim, margin, sRGB, 300-DPI PNG.
